productDisplayName: Quiksilver Men White Cardone Casual Shoes
description: An easy-to-wear icon of casual dressing, these Cardone shoes from quiksilver pay tribute to blue-collar sartorial style with their faux grease stained midsoles. These shoes add a low-key sophistication to off-duty ensembles, you can style this failsafe, low-top pair with washed jeans without over-the-top embellishments and simple tee in shades of blue or green. Comes with a spare set of laces. Upper Synthetic leather upper with contrast stitch detailing Central lace ups Padded tongue Synthetic inner Branding on the heel Midsole PU midsole with Hyperstretch Gel technology in heel section with double foxing tape Outsole Soft vulcanized anti slip multi tread rubber outsole shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
